title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Toki, Unknown person #14, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're going to reward you with...

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: The adventure of a life- time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're Happy for You!! Welcome aboard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pops sure gave you a hard time, huh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait!? Inuarashi... nekomamushi... what are you two doing here!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We figured that you wouldn't stop until you got on this ship, so we stowed away and waited for you, Lord Oden.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey, I found some stow- always here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said you would never forgive me, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So what? Are you going to throw me overboard now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: GURARARARARARARARARARARARARA!! If I feel like it!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: I want to go to Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then please, just let me stay!! I'll do whatever you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, Oden!! We haven't even looked them yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I HAVE NEVER SEEN A BULDING LIKE THAT BEFORE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, Oden!! We need to scout things out first!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Until then, I had never really experienced what this world has to offer!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I had never encountered such coldness or such warmth!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: “DAY BY DAY, I OPENED MY EYES MORE AND MORE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: everything had surpassed my wildest fantasies!!''

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I realised that I was just a tiny speck in this world!!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the news- papers keep focusing on whitebeard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It seems like their latest recruit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, a Samural escaped from that isolated country!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
